problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation may resolve How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
